CustomField.formula: IF( DX_C_TotalNumP__c,"h", IF( DX_C_PropertyNames__c,"g", IF( OR(DX_C_AnotherSiteManager__c, DX_C_RequestForIntroduce__c),"f", IF( DX_C_ResultsReport__c,"e", IF( DX_C_SpecificPropertyName__c,"d", IF( OR(DX_C_RequestToManager__c, DX_C_RequestForDesign__c, DX_C_BIM_RequestForSuperiors__c, DX_C_RequestForManage__c), "c", IF( DX_C_TaskHearing__c,"b", IF( AND(DX_M_AcceptAppointment2__c, OR(DX_O_BIM__c,DX_O_BuildApp__c) ),"a", IF( AND(DX_M_AcceptAppointment1__c, OR(DX_O_Inquiry1__c,DX_O_DocumentRequest1__c ,DX_O_WebinarVideoViewing__c,DX_O_WebinarJoining__c,DX_O_BoothArrive__c) ),"z", "zz" )))))))))
CustomField.label: パーセプションLV_DX
